features.goal: Replace admin's paste-a-URL image input with a real file upload to Vercel Blob
features.why_it_matters: Admin efficiency — removes the need to host photos externally before adding them to a boat listing
acceptance_criteria: Admin can upload a jpeg/png/webp file from the boat edit page and it lands in boat_images with a *.public.blob.vercel-storage.com URL
Uploaded image renders in admin images list and on /fleet
Deleting an image removes the Blob file in addition to the DB row (skipping non-Blob seeded URLs)
deleteImage is scoped to boatId, not just image id
tsc -b, npm run build, npx vitest run all pass
e2e/admin.spec.ts has a new upload case that cleans up its own uploaded file
features.status: code-complete, blocked on real BLOB_READ_WRITE_TOKEN for end-to-end verification

features.goal: Fix three verified defects on /reserva: calendar accent color rendering as blue instead of brand marine/gold, broken-looking 'included/ask-us' extras copy block, and a bg-gold-500 button-fill violation of the gold-is-accent-only design rule
features.why_it_matters: Trust and conversion at the highest-stakes point in the funnel — stray dev-note-sounding copy and off-brand blue calendar accents read as unfinished right before payment
non_goals: Same CTA violation on homepage hero / fleet detail page (deferred by owner decision, tracked in TODOS.md)
Pricing the caviar extra (still open, unaffected)
Any change to /reserva/gracias, fleet pages, or admin
acceptance_criteria: getComputedStyle on .rdp-root's --rdp-accent-color resolves to marine-700, not blue, in a live browser check
'today' marker and nav chevrons render in brand colors, not rgb(0,0,255)
Included/ask-us extras render as styled rows in the same card grid as priced extras, not disconnected captions
askUsExtra copy reworded away from dev-note phrasing in both en.json and es.json
Primary CTA button uses bg-marine-950/hover:bg-marine-900/text-sand-50, no bg-gold-500 fill remaining on /reserva
tsc -b, npm run build, npx vitest run all pass; relevant Playwright booking-flow spec passes
features.status: evaluator-pass-complete, tsc/build/vitest/playwright all green (18/18, 14/14), PR open

features.goal: Bigger/contrast-safe header logo on every page including admin, a mobile nav menu (currently none), and a self-advancing/scroll-cued booking flow on /reserva for mobile
features.why_it_matters: The logo is nearly invisible on the dark hero (navy mark on navy background) and undersized everywhere; mobile has zero nav below md; /reserva's single long form gives first-time mobile users no signal there are 4 steps, risking bounce right before payment
non_goals: Commissioning a new logo asset (CSS filter on the existing logo.webp instead)
The already-deferred sitewide bg-gold-500 CTA violations on homepage/fleet detail
Rebuilding the booking flow into a JS-driven step wizard
acceptance_criteria: getComputedStyle confirms the logo filter (brightness(0) invert(1)) is applied on the transparent header variant, not just visually eyeballed
Logo renders full navy/gold color unchanged on the solid variant
Logo appears on admin login and admin protected layout, previously text-only
Hamburger menu appears below md, opens/closes, links navigate, keyboard-focusable
On /reserva mobile: date selection auto-scrolls to slot section, slot selection auto-scrolls to extras section, prefers-reduced-motion skips smooth scroll
Step-progress indicator visible and reflects current/completed steps
Sticky mobile CTA bar present throughout the form, swaps to real pay button once complete
Calendar does not clip at 360px viewport width
tsc -b, npm run build, npx vitest run, npx playwright test all pass; zero new console errors
features.status: PR open at https://github.com/Jrogbaaa/LealCollection/pull/2 (branch feat/logo-mobile-flow) — evaluator-pass-complete (PASS after one revision loop for menu outside-tap/Escape dismissal) plus a post-pass logo-crop fix from direct owner feedback, tsc/build/vitest/playwright all green (18/18, 14/14)
